question: Building Laws reviewer shell is installed. Replace this cards.json with the real Building Laws cards.json to load all cards.
keyMemory: Use Philippine context first: PD 1096, BP 344, Fire Code, referral codes, UAP/local practice, ALE context.
explanation: This starter folder contains the Building Laws app shell and visual plan. The final cards.json should be the real ALE Building Laws card bank. BP 344/NBCP/Fire Code diagrams should appear after answering, except figure-identification items where question-side diagrams are unlabeled.

answerConceptVisual.title: Building Laws visual rule
answerConceptVisual.main: Philippine code standard diagrams, not random photos
answerConceptVisual.detail: Question-side visuals hide labels; answer-side visuals may show dimensions and notes.

standardVisual.title: Philippine-code-first reviewer
standardVisual.basis: PD 1096 • BP 344 • Fire Code • BP 220/PD 957 • UAP/local practice
standardVisual.note: Replace placeholder cards.json with the real Building Laws cards.
